args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type definitions for Env, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, and client types.
- Internal names noticed: Hono, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, ErrorHandler, MiddlewareHandler, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions.
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client.
- Plain-English summary: Main module entry point that re-exports core Hono classes and types for public consumption.
- Copy-safe detail: Defines @module doc comment with example usage; exports Hono class; exports types from ./types; exports Context class; exports types from ./context; exports HonoRequest type from ./request; exports client types from ./client.

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Interface definitions for HTTPResponseError and type definitions for Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema.
- Internal names noticed: HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, NotFoundResponse, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Env, HonoRequest, Context, Env, Err, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler.
- Imports or neighbors: Exported by ./index.ts; used throughout src/ for typing handlers and context.
- Plain-English summary: Core TypeScript type definitions for the Hono framework including environment, handlers, and schema types.
- Copy-safe detail: HTTPResponseError extends Error; ErrorHandler accepts Error or HTTPResponseError; Env maps to c.var; contains interface and type exports for typed API responses.

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting HonoOptions and defaulting to SmartRouter.
- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankEnv.
- Imports or neighbors: Extends HonoBase; imports from ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types.
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class that extends HonoBase and configures default router.
- Copy-safe detail: Generic class with E, S, BasePath parameters; constructor sets router to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter; calls super(options).

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: HonoBase class with onError() method for custom error handling and compose middleware functions.
- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, env, router, routerPath, getPath, getPathForDebugging, setErrorHandler, onError, handleError, notFoundHandler, notFound, handle, error, finalized, app, compose.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./hono.ts, ./context.ts; imports from ./types, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./utils/types.
- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing routing, middleware composition, and error handling logic.
- Copy-safe detail: errorHandler defaults to logging errors and returning 500 text response; onError() accepts ErrorHandler<E>; #handleError processes errors; compose() uses koa-compose pattern.

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Context class with getter/setter for status, header, json, text, html, redirect, newResponse methods.
- Internal names noticed: Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, req, res, error, status, finalized, request, env, json, text, html, redirect, newResponse, getHeader, setHeader, set, header.
- Imports or neighbors: Exported by ./index.ts; used by ./hono-base.ts, ./compose.ts, ./request.ts; imports from ./request.
- Plain-English summary: Request context class holding response state, variables, and helper methods for generating responses.
- Copy-safe detail: Implements passThroughOnException(); error property holds thrown errors; finalized tracks response state; req provides request access; res holds Response.

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: HonoRequest class wrapping a native Request with body parsing and route tracking.
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, fetchResult, req, raw, method, url, headers, param, body, routeIndex.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./context.ts, ./utils/body.ts; imports from ./http-exception, ./request/constants.
- Plain-English summary: Hono-specific request wrapper extending native Request with additional parsing and tracking capabilities.
- Copy-safe detail: Clones via fetchResult; #clone creates copy; body() parses JSON or text; routeIndex tracks middleware position; throws HTTPException if raw body accessed twice.

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: Single symbol export for match result identification.
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT.
- Imports or neighbors: No imports; used internally for routing match detection.
- Plain-English summary: Module exports a unique symbol for identifying router match results.
- Copy-safe detail: GET_MATCH_RESULT is a unique symbol created via Symbol(); used by router for dispatch identification.

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: parseBody function for parsing form data and form-urlencoded content.
- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, ParseBody, ParseBodyOptions.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./request.ts; imports from ../request.
- Plain-English summary: Utility for parsing request body content with support for arrays and dot notation nesting.
- Copy-safe detail: Handles multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded; all option creates arrays for duplicate keys; dot option creates nested objects from dot notation keys.

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: compose() function for middleware composition returning a Context-returning function.
- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, context, next, index, middleware, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Env.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./hono-base.ts; imports from ./context, ./types.
- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility implementing the koa-compose pattern for dispatching middleware.
- Copy-safe detail: Takes middleware array, optional onError, and onNotFound handlers; dispatch() function tracks index to prevent multiple next() calls; returns Context with response attached.

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with res, status, and getResponse() method.
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse, res, status, message, cause.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./request.ts, ./context.ts; imports from ./utils/http-status.
- Plain-English summary: Custom HTTP exception for authentication failures and other fatal errors requiring specific status codes.
- Copy-safe detail: Constructor accepts status code (defaults to 500) and options; getResponse() returns Response with optional body and headers.

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: hc() function and parseResponse for type inference on HTTP client calls.
- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse.
- Imports or neighbors: Used in ./index.ts; imports from ./client, ./utils.
- Plain-English summary: HTTP Client API exposing helper functions for building typed REST client code.
- Copy-safe detail: Exports hc from ./client; exports parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils; exports InferResponseType, InferRequestType, and client types from ./types.

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: hc proxy creation function and ClientRequestImpl class for building client requests.
- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, fetch, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, createProxy, proxyCallback.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./index.ts; imports from ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils.
- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation using proxy pattern to build method chains that generate fetch calls.
- Copy-safe detail: createProxy wraps callback with path tracking; ClientRequestImpl builds URLs and request bodies; hc creates proxy with method chain support; handles form, json, param, query, and cookie args.

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: ClientResponse, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions type definitions.
- Internal names noticed: ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, Client, ClientRequest, UnionToIntersection.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./index.ts, ./client.ts, ./utils.ts; defines client-side typing utilities.
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for the HTTP client including response inference and request type mapping.
- Copy-safe detail: ClientResponse has status, data, requestType, method, responseStatusCode; InferRequestType maps to data; uses UnionToIntersection for method union.

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge functions.
- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./client.ts; imports from ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types.
- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, query string building, and object merging.
- Copy-safe detail: mergePath normalizes slashes; replaceUrlParam substitutes named parameters; buildSearchParams creates URLSearchParams; deepMerge recursively merges objects.

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: fetchRP function and DetailedError class for parsing fetch responses.
- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, detectResponseType, nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./utils.ts; adapted from ofetch.
- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch result parser that auto-detects JSON vs text and throws DetailedError on non-ok responses.
- Copy-safe detail: fetchRP awaits response, detects body type by content-type, sets _data on response, throws DetailedError with status on failures; nullBodyResponses excludes 101, 204, 205, 304.

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: fire() function for registering Hono app with service worker fetch event listener.
- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, addEventListener, Hono, HandleOptions.
- Imports or neighbors: Exports handle and fire; imports from ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler.
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers a Hono app to handle 'fetch' events in service workers.
- Copy-safe detail: fire() calls addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)) with @ts-expect-error; accepts Hono app and HandleOptions; exports handle and fire.

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: handle() function wrapping Hono app for service worker fetch handler.
- Internal names noticed: handle, FetchEvent, HandleOptions, app, fetch, respondWith, evt.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by ./index.ts; imports from ../../hono, ../../types, ./types.
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker handler factory that creates a function processing fetch events through a Hono app.
- Copy-safe detail: binds globalThis.fetch by default; evt.respondWith wraps async app.fetch call; handles 404 fallback to opts.fetch.

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with Service Worker specific properties.
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, waitUntil, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith.
- Imports or neighbors: No imports; used by ./handler.ts.
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface.
- Copy-safe detail: ExtendableEvent has waitUntil(f: Promise<any>); FetchEvent has clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId; respondWith takes Response or PromiseLike<Response>.

## Path Inventory

- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
